text: In my line of work, you need to know your numbers. This? This is Metabase. Beautiful.
Sit down. We're gonna build something.

precondition.describe: FY26 Q4 Board Review dashboard exists to anchor generation

text: Patience. The machine is working. You know, in my time, we wrote this on a notepad. Numbers. Names. Territories. By hand. Now? It does it for you. It thinks. It writes. Beautiful machine.
Up thirty-four percent. Good quarter. For most of us.

precondition.expect: data && data.name === 'Monthly revenue, FY26 vs. FY25'

text: Cohibas are moving. Keep them stocked.

precondition.expect: data && data.name === 'Top 5 SKUs by Q4 revenue'

text: Now. New Jersey. Eighty-two percent. One name. Sal. We need to talk.

precondition.expect: data && data.name === 'Q4 revenue by region (by distributor)'

text: Next year, we go to Sicily. Family business.

precondition.expect: data && data.name === 'FY27 projected revenue by region'

text: This is how a family stays on top. Metabase. Tell 'em the Don sent you.
